_comment_: VWFA single-ROI panel copy. No deltas or overlaps for an N=1 view; copy stays for when a panel returns or for the cross-paper compare route.

whatItDoes: Activates rapidly and selectively for written words across fonts, cases, and presentation variants. Cohen 2002 established it as a focal, reproducible region in the left mid-fusiform that responds to letter strings well above other visual stimuli.
whatLightsUp: A small patch on the underside of the left temporal lobe, where visual cortex meets the language network.

checkable.text: Yes — readers vs non-readers show striking VWFA differences.
